summary: Iteration 53: Complete testing of Supplier Auto-Suggestion Combobox feature. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend combobox components fully functional in RdP, OdA, Conto Lavoro dialogs (CommessaOpsPanel) and ArticoliPage.

issues: React warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined}' for DialogContent - cosmetic accessibility warning, not affecting functionality

fornitori_filter.required_fields: PASS - Response includes client_id and business_name for combobox
fornitori_filter.cliente_fornitore_included: PASS - client_type=cliente_fornitore included in fornitore filter
fornitori_filter.search_filter: PASS - Search parameter works with fornitore filter

procurement_integration.rdp_with_fornitore_id: PASS - RdP stores fornitore_id and fornitore_nome
procurement_integration.commessa_ops_fornitori: PASS - GET /commesse/{id}/ops returns fornitore data in richieste/ordini/conto_lavoro

articoli_integration.create_with_fornitore: PASS - POST /articoli/ accepts fornitore_id and fornitore_nome

combobox_component.renders_correctly: PASS - Combobox component renders with trigger button and dropdown
combobox_component.search_functionality: PASS - Typing in search filters options in real-time
combobox_component.selection_display: PASS - Selected supplier name displayed in combobox trigger

rdp_dialog.suppliers_loaded: PASS - 3 suppliers shown (Acciaierie Milano SRL, Metalli Bergamo SNC, Verniciature Torino SPA)
rdp_dialog.search_filters: PASS - Typing 'Mila' filters to 'Acciaierie Milano SRL' only
rdp_dialog.rdp_creation: PASS - RdP created with selected fornitore, appears in list with 'inviata' badge

oda_dialog.selection_works: PASS - Selected 'Metalli Bergamo SNC' displayed correctly

conto_lavoro_dialog.selection_works: PASS - Selected 'Verniciature Torino SPA' displayed correctly

articoli_page.combobox_present: PASS - data-testid='input-fornitore' found in Nuovo Articolo dialog
articoli_page.selection_works: PASS - Selected supplier displayed, form fillable with fornitore

critical_code_review_comments: Combobox component correctly implements Command + Popover pattern from shadcn/ui
Search filtering uses useMemo for performance with client-side filtering
Fornitore filter in clients.py correctly uses $in operator to include both 'fornitore' and 'cliente_fornitore' types
CommessaOpsPanel properly loads fornitori on mount with useEffect
ArticoliPage properly loads fornitori on mount with useEffect
Both components pass fornitore_id and fornitore_nome to backend for proper association

seed_data_creation: Created 3 test suppliers: Acciaierie Milano SRL (fornitore), Verniciature Torino SPA (fornitore), Metalli Bergamo SNC (cliente_fornitore). Created test commessa com_08cfca0f308c with RdP.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supplier Combobox feature fully tested and working. Key components: /app/frontend/src/components/ui/combobox.jsx (searchable dropdown). Usage: CommessaOpsPanel (RdP, OdA, Conto Lavoro dialogs) and ArticoliPage (fornitore selection). Backend: /api/clients/?client_type=fornitore returns suppliers with correct filtering. Test session combobox_session_1772284732997 has 3 test suppliers and 1 test commessa.
